news.t: Federated Hermes, Inc. launches four MDT quantitative active ETFs
Federated Hermes, Inc. launches U.S. Strategic Dividend ETF

holdings.infoBox: FDV is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are AbbVie stock at 4.33%, The PNC Financial Services Group at 4.23%, Paychex at 4.04%, U.S. Bancorp at 3.72%, and Amgen at 3.54%.

overview.description: The Federated Hermes U.S. Strategic Dividend ETF (FDV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund seeks income and long-term capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of high dividend-paying US stocks with the potential for dividend growth. FDV was launched on Nov 15, 2022 and is issued by Federated Hermes.
